dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, your efforts to {quest_action} rattled {quest_threat_animate_the}. They have turned desperate and struck at {quest_stakes_the} again.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} confirmed that {enemy_type_plural} are being used as enforcers near {quest_focus_the}. They have been gathering {location_hint}. We need to break through them and cut off the escape route.
dialogueChunks.outro: Justice demands we finish this. They cannot be allowed to keep hurting people.

dialogueChunks.intro: It is worse than we thought, {player_name}. Since you began to {quest_action}, we discovered that {quest_threat_the} did not act alone.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: There are accomplices hiding near {quest_focus_the}. {quest_ally} found evidence {location_hint}. The {enemy_type_plural} they recruited are guarding the area. We need to cut through every last one of them.
dialogueChunks.outro: Every one of them played a part in harming {quest_stakes_the}. They all answer for it.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, {quest_threat_animate_the} left a warning. They know you are coming, and they have fortified their position near {quest_focus_the}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} intercepted signs that {enemy_type_plural} are patrolling the approaches {location_hint}. They are daring us to come after them. {quest_stakes_The} will remain at risk until we confront them directly.
dialogueChunks.outro: They think they can intimidate us. Prove them wrong.
